packages.name: github-devloop
packages.purpose: The end-to-end loop: claims an open GitHub issue and drives it through intake, code, and PR using the codex LLM agent.

packages.name: frontend-devloop
packages.purpose: A devloop tuned for frontend work — takes a UI issue from claim to a reviewed pull request.

packages.name: github-proxy
packages.purpose: Polls GitHub for new and updated issues and labels, emitting them as events the loop can claim.

packages.name: consensus
packages.purpose: A multi-vote agreement gate: a decision only proceeds once enough independent voices concur.

packages.name: github-devloop-intake
packages.purpose: Reads a fresh issue, validates it, and shapes it into a well-formed work item for the loop.

packages.name: github-devloop-decompose
packages.purpose: Breaks a large issue into ordered, self-contained sub-tasks the agent implements one at a time.

packages.name: github-devloop-pr
packages.purpose: Opens and updates the pull request — branch, commits, description, and the closing issue link.

packages.name: github-devloop-integration
packages.purpose: Watches CI and reconciles review state, merging once every required check is green.

packages.name: github-devloop-ops
packages.purpose: Runs the operational chores of a session — labels, comments, status, and cleanup on the issue.

packages.name: idle-detector
packages.purpose: Notices when a session has gone quiet and signals the loop to wrap up or hand off.

packages.name: integration-coverage-producer
packages.purpose: Generates and reports test-coverage artifacts so integration gates have real numbers to judge.
